headline: Smart City Programme Spends RM1.2 Billion With Little Result
context: National Smart City Framework spent RM1.2 billion across 28 pilot cities but audit found only 6 have functional smart systems.

cards.big: Only 6 of 28 smart city pilots functional after RM1.2 billion since 2019
cards.sub: Audit found 18 cities had abandoned or non-operational smart systems

cards.big: RM480 million went to IoT sensors and cameras with 45% non-functional by 2025
cards.sub: Maintenance contracts expired and local councils lacked technical capacity

cards.big: Cyberjaya spent RM85 million on smart traffic saving only 4 minutes per trip
cards.sub: Cost-benefit shows RM21 million per minute of travel time saved

cards.big: Iskandar smart waste achieved 22% efficiency gain across 3 municipalities
cards.sub: Only successful large deployment but requires RM12 million annual maintenance

cards.big: Smart city failure tests whether technology investment follows a sustainability plan
RM1.2 billion on smart city with little result. Technology without governance reform produces expensive dashboards.
